name: travel-skills
description: Agent skills for accommodation search, availability, pricing, cross-OTA comparison and reviews via ScoutingAPI.
author: ScoutingAPI

skills.name: scoutingapi-search
skills.description: Search and compare accommodation prices across Airbnb, Booking.com, Vrbo and Google Hotels via the ScoutingAPI REST API. Use when a user wants to find stays, check availability, get a price, compare one property across OTAs, or read reviews. Covers Bearer auth, the async 202→poll job contract, the unified response envelope, and error handling.

skills.name: scoutingapi-mcp
skills.description: Connect an AI agent to the ScoutingAPI Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for accommodation search, availability, pricing, cross-OTA price comparison and reviews. Use when the agent runtime supports MCP connectors (e.g. Claude) and you want OAuth-based access without managing API keys. Covers the OAuth 2.1 + PKCE connect flow, the seven read-only tools, and when to prefer MCP vs REST.

skills.name: scoutingapi-cross-ota-price-comparison
skills.description: Compare one property across booking platforms and report the cheapest rate, with savings vs. the median. Powered by the ScoutingAPI REST API / MCP server.

skills.name: scoutingapi-availability-alert
skills.description: Watch a listing over a date window and get alerted the moment a wanted date becomes available. Powered by the ScoutingAPI REST API / MCP server.

skills.name: scoutingapi-price-drop-watcher
skills.description: Watch a specific stay and get alerted the moment its total price falls to or below your threshold. Powered by the ScoutingAPI REST API / MCP server.

skills.name: scoutingapi-rate-parity-monitor
skills.description: Watch how your own listing's rate shows across OTAs on a schedule and flag any platform underselling the market median. Powered by the ScoutingAPI REST API / MCP server.

skills.name: scoutingapi-str-market-scan
skills.description: Scan a short-term-rental market — discover listings across platforms, price the top N for your dates, and append a normalized row-per-listing dataset to a Google Sheet. Powered by the ScoutingAPI REST API / MCP server.

skills.name: scoutingapi-new-inventory-lead-gen
skills.description: Re-run a saved search on a schedule, diff it against the last run, and sync only the newly-listed properties into a CRM or Sheet as leads. Powered by the ScoutingAPI REST API / MCP server.

skills.name: scoutingapi-review-intelligence-digest
skills.description: Pull normalized reviews for a property on a schedule and deliver a weekly digest — average rating, recurring themes, and the latest complaints to act on. Powered by the ScoutingAPI REST API / MCP server.

skills.name: scoutingapi-comp-set-benchmark
skills.description: Benchmark your listing’s rate and availability against a defined comp-set and get a weekly position report. Powered by the ScoutingAPI REST API / MCP server.

skills.name: scoutingapi-mcp-agent-scouting
skills.description: Connect ScoutingAPI as a Claude/Cursor MCP connector and scout stays, compare prices and check availability conversationally — no keys pasted. Powered by the ScoutingAPI REST API / MCP server.

skills.name: scoutingapi-cheapest-link-resolver
skills.description: Resolve a property + dates to the single cheapest bookable link (with price and OTA) as clean JSON — for a concierge bot, a "book now" button, or an internal tool. Powered by the ScoutingAPI REST API / MCP server.
